title: Korean Naengmyeon with Spicy Yellow Curry Paste
description: A refreshing and spicy Korean dish featuring naengmyeon, a cold buckwheat or starch noodle. This version is inspired by the flavors of Seoul.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Light soy sauce is best for this dish

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the naengmyeon noodles and ice.
In a small saucepan, combine the yellow curry paste, gochujang, soy sauce, and brown sugar.
Whisk the mixture over medium heat until the sugar has dissolved.
Add the water to the saucepan and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the sauce for 5 minutes.
Strain the sauce into a bowl and discard the solids.
Add the sliced cucumber, carrots, and pickled radish to the bowl with the sauce.
Toss the naengmyeon noodles in the sauce until they are well coated.
Divide the noodles among four bowls and top each bowl with chopped green onions and crushed ice.
